results.name: conjure-to-graveyard
results.description: Cards that conjure cards into graveyards.

results.name: conjure-to-hand
results.description: Cards that conjure cards to your hand.

results.name: conjure-to-library
results.description: Cards that conjure cards into libraries.

results.name: construction
results.description: Something's being built here.

results.name: consulate symbol
results.description: The symbol of the Kaladesh Consulate, depicting an aether reservoir.

results.name: consult
results.description: Dig through your library until you find a card meeting some criteria.

results.name: consult-cast
results.description: Consult effects that let you cast the card you find.

results.name: consult-onto-battlefield
results.description: Consult effects that put the card you find onto the battlefield.

results.name: container
results.description: Things designed to hold other things.

results.name: control changing effects
results.description: Effects that change control of cards, permanents, and spells.

results.name: converge
results.description: Spells that do something equal to the number of colors spent to cast them.

results.name: convoke
results.description: Cards that let you tap creatures to pay less or no mana for them.

results.name: cooper howard
results.description: Also known as "The Ghoul".

results.name: copper host
results.description: The green aligned phyrexian invasion forces

results.name: copy
results.description: Effects that copy things

results.name: copy-legendary
results.description: These cards can give you a copy of a legendary permanent you control that you can actually keep (instead of immediately sacrificing).

results.name: copy-nonland
results.description: Effects that allow you to copy permanents of any type except for land.

results.name: copy-permanent
results.description: Effects that allow you to copy any permanent, regardless of its card type.

results.name: copy-self
results.description: Cards that make a copy of themselves

results.name: copy-spell
results.description: Make a copy of a spell on the stack.

results.name: copy-token
results.description: Effects that copy specifically tokens, like populate.

results.name: corpse
results.description: He's dead, Jim.

results.name: cosplay
results.description: Characters dressed up in costume to look like another character.

results.name: cost reducer
results.description: Cards that make other spells cost less. (Does not apply to effects that reduce a spell's own cost, like delve.)
